name: F4map
description: 3D interactive world map Tool: https://demo.f4map.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #716 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map F4map output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved F4map output file to parse instead of running it live.
